summary: Frontend testing of Learn page fixes and system-wide updates (iteration 177). Tested: Learn page hero, category modals, Mira's Picks fallback, profile drawer, 7 dim cards, font sizes, tab bar, Care breed filter, footer Fit removal, pet home 13 pillars.

ui_bugs.issue: Foundations category modal shows 0 products. Category name 'Learn Foundations' may not match the DB category field for learn products.
Some products shown have incorrect mira_reason ('Makes celebrations special' for training products). Data quality issue in DB scoring.

issues: +5 pts / +3 pts point badges use fontSize:9 in JSX (9px) - rendered as browser min 10px. Minor cosmetic.

action_items: Verify 'Learn Foundations' category name in DB matches what LearnContentModal queries for the foundations category pill
Optional: Fix mira_reason data quality for learn-pillar products in DB (scoring script run needed)
critical_code_review_comments: PetHomePage.jsx - minor React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - add key prop to list items
LearnSoulPage.jsx line ~413: fontSize:9 for points badges - browser clamps to 10px but technically below spec
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 test items from review_request confirmed PASS. Learn page h1=40px (clamp identical to care/dine/go). Mira's Picks modal shows 16 real products (fallback working). Profile drawer has dark indigo gradient header + close X. 7 dim cards 3-col large layout (309px wide). Tab bar has 3 tabs. Care Mira's Picks shows no American Bully products for Indie Mojo. Footer has no Fit link. Pet home has 13 pillars. One minor issue: Foundations category modal shows 0 products (possible category name mismatch in DB).

test_results_detail.learn_mira_picks_modal: PASS - 16 real products shown, NO imagines text in modal
test_results_detail.learn_profile_drawer: PASS - dark indigo gradient header, close X present
test_results_detail.7_dim_cards: PASS - 3-col grid, 309px wide cards, 52px icon, title, description, Explore CTA
test_results_detail.tab_bar: PASS - 3 tabs: Learn & Products, Book a Session, Find Learn
test_results_detail.care_mira_picks_breed_filter: PASS - no American Bully products shown to Indie Mojo
test_results_detail.footer_fit_link: PASS - no Fit link in footer (code confirmed)
test_results_detail.pet_home_13_pillars: PASS - 13 pillars: celebrate, care, dine, go, enjoy, learn, shop, adopt, paperwork, advisory, emergency, farewell, services
test_results_detail.foundations_modal_products: ISSUE - 0 product images loaded (category name mismatch possible)
